'''zhongahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cableless|cableless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cableless|cableless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhongahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongahithi|zhongahithi]] || [[word:zhongahiji|zhongahiji]] || [[word:zhongahishi|zhongahishi]] || [[word:zhongahiki|zhongahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongahuthuthu|zhongahuthuthu]] || [[word:zhongahujuju|zhongahujuju]] || [[word:zhongahushushu|zhongahushushu]] || [[word:zhongahukuku|zhongahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongahuthu|zhongahuthu]] || [[word:zhongahuju|zhongahuju]] || [[word:zhongahushu|zhongahushu]] || [[word:zhongahuku|zhongahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongahufthuf|zhongahufthuf]] || [[word:zhongahufjuf|zhongahufjuf]] || [[word:zhongahufshuf|zhongahufshuf]] || [[word:zhongahufkuf|zhongahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongahethe|zhongahethe]] || [[word:zhongaheje|zhongaheje]] || [[word:zhongaheshe|zhongaheshe]] || [[word:zhongaheke|zhongaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongahothotho|zhongahothotho]] || [[word:zhongahojojo|zhongahojojo]] || [[word:zhongahoshosho|zhongahoshosho]] || [[word:zhongahokoko|zhongahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongahotho|zhongahotho]] || [[word:zhongahojo|zhongahojo]] || [[word:zhongahosho|zhongahosho]] || [[word:zhongahoko|zhongahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongahofthof|zhongahofthof]] || [[word:zhongahofjof|zhongahofjof]] || [[word:zhongahofshof|zhongahofshof]] || [[word:zhongahofkof|zhongahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfthĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfjĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfshĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhongahĂŻfkĂŻf|zhongahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhongahĂŠthĂŠ|zhongahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongahĂŠjĂŠ|zhongahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongahĂŠshĂŠ|zhongahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhongahĂŠkĂŠ|zhongahĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhongahathatha|zhongahathatha]] || [[word:zhongahajaja|zhongahajaja]] || [[word:zhongahashasha|zhongahashasha]] || [[word:zhongahakaka|zhongahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhongahatha|zhongahatha]] || [[word:zhongahaja|zhongahaja]] || [[word:zhongahasha|zhongahasha]] || [[word:zhongahaka|zhongahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhongahafthaf|zhongahafthaf]] || [[word:zhongahafjaf|zhongahafjaf]] || [[word:zhongahafshaf|zhongahafshaf]] || [[word:zhongahafkaf|zhongahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhongahasha|zhongahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongahshĂ«sha|zhongahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongahrosha|zhongahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongahmusha|zhongahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongahyasha|zhongahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongahnkshĂ«sha|gozhongahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongahnkrosha|gozhongahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongahnkmusha|gozhongahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongahnkyasha|gozhongahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhongangahasha|zhongangahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongangahshĂ«sha|zhongangahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongangahrosha|zhongangahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongangahmusha|zhongangahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongangahyasha|zhongangahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongangahnkshĂ«sha|gozhongangahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongangahnkrosha|gozhongangahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongangahnkmusha|gozhongangahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongangahnkyasha|gozhongangahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhengĂŠhasha|zhengĂŠhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhengĂŠhshĂ«sha|zhengĂŠhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhengĂŠhrosha|zhengĂŠhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhengĂŠhmusha|zhengĂŠhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhengĂŠhyasha|zhengĂŠhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠhnkshĂ«sha|gozhengĂŠhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠhnkrosha|gozhengĂŠhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠhnkmusha|gozhengĂŠhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhengĂŠhnkyasha|gozhengĂŠhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhongfahasha|zhongfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhongfahshĂ«sha|zhongfahshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhongfahrosha|zhongfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhongfahmusha|zhongfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhongfahyasha|zhongfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhongfahnkshĂ«sha|gozhongfahnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhongfahnkrosha|gozhongfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhongfahnkmusha|gozhongfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhongfahnkyasha|gozhongfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
